name: Stripe Payment Gateway
description: Official Stripe payment integration for Jiffoo stores. Supports credit/debit card payments, refunds, and webhook-based status tracking.
author: Jiffoo Team

secretKey.label: Stripe Secret Key
secretKey.description: Starts with sk_live_ or sk_test_. Found in Stripe Dashboard > Developers > API keys.

publishableKey.label: Stripe Publishable Key
publishableKey.description: Starts with pk_live_ or pk_test_. Found in Stripe Dashboard > Developers > API keys.

webhookSecret.label: Webhook Signing Secret
webhookSecret.description: Starts with whsec_. Found in Stripe Dashboard > Developers > Webhooks > Signing secret.
